title: Add error context to relay message parse failures
description: File: tui/src/event.rs — multiple serde_json parse errors in handle_relay_event lack context about which field failed. Examples at lines 134, 237, 287, 304, 336, 350, 408, 488. When parsing DirectoryListParams, UserJoinedParams, etc. fails, include the struct name and error details so debugging parse failures doesnt require reading error chain context.
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
